sections.title: Talking to her before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: Have you heard? My eldest son has been chosen as a sacrifice to the mighty Zulrah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you feel about that?

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: Oh, it's such an honour. He's so excited to be coming face-to-face with Zulrah, and offering himself on behalf of the tribe.

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: Also, when the sacrifice is made, his brother and I will get an extra large ration of the sacred swamp eels that Zul-Onan catches. I can't wait!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you mind that your son will die?

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: It's the greatest honour to which any of us can aspire! I only hope that the High Priestess will one day choose me.

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: The extra large ration of sacred swamp eels will be nice too.

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: You queue-jumper! My eldest son was chosen as a sacrifice to Zulrah, but now the priests say you're going to sacrifice yourself first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're angry that I've saved your son's life?

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: The sacrifice is the greatest honour to which any of us can aspire! He was so excited to be coming face-to-face with Zulrah, and offering himself on behalf of the tribe.

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: Also, I won't get the extra large ration of sacred swamp eels if my son doesn't make the sacrifice. Shame on you!

lines.speaker: Zul-Cheray
lines.text: Quite right. Now get on with sacrificing yourself.
